trade_api_search_templates.note: Use poe.ninja / trade sites; these templates show which mods to prioritize per slot

must_have_4.reason: Scales with high added-damage effectiveness; high impact early

search_progression: Step 1: Filter item type (Wand) + min spell damage 50%
Step 5: Sort by price; evaluate top 20

budget_breakpoints.early_maps: budget 5-20c for solid base (50% spell, 15% crit, 0.2 speed, 15 flat)
budget_breakpoints.mid_maps: budget 50-200c for upgrade (60% spell, 20% crit, 0.25 speed, 25 flat)
budget_breakpoints.late_maps: budget 500c-5ex for high-roll (70%+ spell, 25%+ crit, 0.3+ speed, 35+ flat)

search_progression: Step 1: Filter item type (Robe) + min life 80
Step 4: Add ≥30% lightning resistance (or accept two of three capped)
Step 5: Sort by life (descending); evaluate top 30

body_armour_search_with_crimson.note: If Crimson Power is allocated: ES converts to extra maximum life (damage + defense)

must_have_1.reason: Converts to extra life (priority if Crimson allocated)

body_armour_search_with_crimson.secondary: Maximum Life (if ES slot has room)
search_progression: Step 1: Filter item type + min ES 250
Step 2: Add fire/cold/lightning ≥30% (pick two or all three)
Step 4: Evaluate top 20; cross-check life rolls

must_have_1.reason: NON-NEGOTIABLE; rhythm plants feet; time between casts = danger

boots_search.priority_note: Movement speed IS the primary affix; do not sacrifice it for small life/res gains
search_progression: Step 5: Prioritize speed over life trades
Step 2: Add chaos damage (if searching amulet/ring separately)
Step 3: Sort by life (descending) or combined stats

flask_search.rarity: unique OR rare with perfect mods

must_have_1.reason: Speed up flask; life-spend class makes this tier-0

flask_search.search_note: Most life flasks are rares; uniques may not match all stats. Judge by recovery rate + charges generated
flask_search.budget: 50-500c for perfect roll depending on phase

the_covenant.decision_rule: Judge raw ES/life roll vs. rare; if rare is better baseline, use it
the_covenant.price_check: If cheap (<20c), test it; thematic feel may be worth it

shavronne_wrapping.value: High ES + chaos damage cannot bypass
shavronne_wrapping.decision: Only if Crimson Power node is taken (ES → extra life). Otherwise, skip.
shavronne_wrapping.es_to_life: ES converts to extra maximum life via Crimson Power ascendancy

kaom_heart.value: Huge life roll + no gem sockets
kaom_heart.tradeoff: Lose gem flexibility; 6L Hexblast must be elsewhere or unlinked
kaom_heart.use_case: Late endgame if 6L is solved elsewhere; early/mid typically not worth

crown_of_eyes.value: Spell damage scaled by crit chance
crown_of_eyes.decision_rule: Run DPS calc (with + without); rare helmet often wins if pure DPS

early_maps.strategy: Cap all three (fire/cold/lightning) before progressing tier difficulty

resistances_cap_strategy.res_cap_priority: Cap resistances BEFORE pushing damage; one-shots kill faster than low DPS
